compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for security_overlay classifier flag
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Modify tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh to add failing tests for the security_overlay boolean flag.

### Test approach
Create diff fixtures containing security-sensitive file paths (auth/, security/, crypto/), import patterns (from auth, import crypto), and diff content (password, secret, token). Run the classifier with each fixture and assert the JSON output contains "security_overlay":true. Create a non-security fixture and assert "security_overlay":false.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and FAIL (RED) — security_overlay field not yet emitted
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] At least 4 test cases: auth path, crypto path, security import in diff, non-security path
  Verify: grep -c "test_security_overlay" tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] Tests use behavioral assertions (run classifier, parse JSON output)
  Verify: grep -q "run_classifier" tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — RED tests written and confirmed failing. .test-index RED markers set.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests written, committed in ba861337
